label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out if the hedgehog caused the problem that the polar bear had with not being able to finish his homework. First, I need to understand the scenario. There's a bear and a hedgehog. They were both shown a box of colored pencils. The rule is that only bears are allowed to take pencils. The hedgehog wasn't there when the rule was announced, so it doesn't know the rule. Both the bear and the hedgehog took pencils out of the box six times alternately. Then they both came to the box at the same time and took a pencil each. After that, a polar bear comes to get a pencil,
